news.t: It was the world's hottest stock market. Now South Korea's stock-market index has entered bear-market territory
South Korean shares slump 5.2% as AI valuation concerns trigger chip stock selloff
South Korea Inflation Accelerates to 30-Month High in June

Massive bonuses for South Korea's chip workers puts central bank on inflation alert

holdings.infoBox: KORU is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MSCI South Korea Bull 3X ETF (KORU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Korea 25-50 index. The fund provides 300% daily leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap South Korean companies. KORU was launched on Apr 11, 2013 and is issued by Direxion.
